title: Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Growth
text: Riot Platforms demonstrated strong growth in 2024, with revenue reaching $376.7 million, representing a 34% year-over-year increase. The company achieved net income of $109.4 million ($0.40 per share), a significant turnaround from a net loss of $49.5 million in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA more than doubled to $463.2 million from $214 million previously. Gross profit improved to $147.6 million, up from $97.6 million in the prior year. Bitcoin mining revenue surged 70% to $321 million in 2024. However, the company produced 27% less Bitcoin compared to 2023, primarily due to the halving event that occurred mid-year. Despite lower production, Riot increased its Bitcoin holdings by 141% quarter-over-quarter, ending 2024 with 17,722 Bitcoin. The company expanded its self-mining hash rate by 154% during 2024, significantly outpacing the global increase of 67%. Mining costs rose to $42,011 per Bitcoin in Q4 2024, driven by elevated spot market power rates of $0.034 per kilowatt hour. CEO Jason Les indicated the company is pursuing multiple tracks to maximize value through partnerships with hyperscalers and infrastructure providers regarding AI/HPC opportunities. Riot plans approximately 22% hash rate growth in 2025, primarily through Kentucky facility expansions.
